overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The player navigates from narrow alleys to open streets, past food stalls and futuristic storefronts, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

events.description: exits narrow alley onto main street with view of large circular building

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alleyway toward the street exit, passing air conditioning units and neon signs

entered.detail: blue neon sign with arrow pointing left mounted on concrete wall
large industrial HVAC unit suspended from ceiling
weathered concrete walls with pipes and industrial fixtures
yellow industrial bin with black bags
glass-fronted vending machine with red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow service alleyway with industrial air conditioning units overhead and neon signage. The camera moves forward through the enclosed concrete corridor, passing trash containers and vending machines, before emerging at the alley exit where the bright lights of the main street and a large circular building become visible.

events.description: black SUV drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing vending machines and digital billboards, approaching an intersection

elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: Having exited the alley, the scene opens onto a wide urban street dominated by a massive circular building with red neon lights in the distance. The camera walks along the sidewalk past futuristic vending machines and digital billboards. A pedestrian with red hair stands near a vending machine on the right as a black SUV passes on the street.

enters covered walkway area with traditional Japanese restaurant facade and red lanterns

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and entering the restaurant alleyway with red paper lanterns

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at a yellow-striped crosswalk, passing under a traffic light. Upon reaching the opposite side, the scene transitions to a more enclosed walkway featuring the 'Ganymede' Japanese restaurant with traditional red paper lanterns and a metal security gate. A person stands at the restaurant counter under green neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining courtyard with food stalls and scattered seating

events.description: approaching food stall with orange umbrella and warm yellow lighting

agents.ego_description: exploring the courtyard area, weaving between food stalls and outdoor plastic seating

metal food cart illuminated by bright green neon light

blue neon sign reading 'PAWN SHOP' above storefront
littered papers and cardboard scattered across the tiled ground

segments.scene_description: The segment explores a semi-covered courtyard dining area with scattered plastic chairs and tables. Food stalls with distinctive orange umbrellas and green neon lighting line the space. Vendors and pedestrians populate the area while the camera moves through the littered tiles, passing a pawnshop sign visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with pawnshop and towering residential building

events.description: exits courtyard back onto main street with view of pawnshop
camera tilts upward to look up the facade of tall residential tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past the pawnshop, then looking up at the towering residential building before returning to street level

notable_agents.action: black van driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: green and yellow pawnshop facade with metal security grating and display windows
massive high-rise apartment building with hundreds of illuminated balconies and windows
elevated pedestrian bridge or transit line crossing between buildings
tall palm tree trunk visible on sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the courtyard, the scene returns to the main street featuring a prominent pawnshop with green neon signage. The camera walks past the storefront and tilts upward to reveal a massive residential tower covered in illuminated balconies. The segment ends with a view of the intersection, where the circular neon building from earlier reappears in the distance and a black van drives through.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into the sprawling, neon-drenched vibrancy of a futuristic downtown district. It begins by navigating a narrow concrete corridor beneath overhead air conditioning units and vending machines before emerging into the open glare of a wide urban street dominated by a massive circular building with red neon lights. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, the scene shifts from the open road into a more intimate walkway featuring the red paper lanterns of the Ganymede restaurant and a semi-covered courtyard filled with orange umbrellas and green neon food stalls. The movement then flows out of the dining area and back onto the main street, passing a green-lit pawnshop while the camera tilts upward to reveal a towering residential complex with illuminated balconies. Finally, the view settles on a busy intersection where a black van drives past, bringing the circular neon architecture back into sight.
